pageLayout: P1: Header, CV summary, key impacts, most important skills table.
P2: Recent roles (LBBW, Union Investment, Saloodo!, Trusted Shops).
P4: Education, skills, career breaks; footer: AI disclaimer.
constraints: Valid LuaLaTeX with standard packages only.
Use all career data, minimize empty space on pages.

antiCv.cvType: Anti-CV: Humorous failures/lessons, self-deprecating but professional.
antiCv.incrementalInstructions: Add failures in humor style. Keep {{PAGES}} pages.

professionalCv.cvType: Professional CV: quantified impact, leadership, business value.
